purpose: Independent K0 source-to-implementation map. It limits KERC claims to the mechanisms actually exercised by the current code, data, objectives, and evaluators.

incremental_replay_contract.k1l_rebuild_scope: all 9,785 GUM discourse admissions were independently recomputed under bounded spawned workers while 18,156 unrelated semantic admissions were reused; candidate, canonical, ledger, aggregate, and gate identities were independently replayed
incremental_replay_contract.claim_ceiling: Replay performance, restartability, selective invalidation, integrity, and physical resource accounting only; no semantic, learned, utility, compression, or KERC-thesis claim.

canonical_training_stage.claim_ceiling: Governed architecture and learned-objective data readiness only. No trained competence, semantic utility, compression, efficiency, KERC-success, or scientific-negative claim.

mechanisms.current_finding: Immutable source and typed protected-object storage exist, but protected-span extraction is a deterministic regex baseline rather than a trained calibrated detector.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Exact source/object protocol mechanics only; no learned protected-span recall, domain robustness, or abstention claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Source-disjoint learned detector with span recall, weak tails, calibration, adversarial identifiers/quotes/code, abstention, and exact-object intervention tests.

mechanisms.current_finding: The correction-lattice schema preserves uncertainty, but the canonical corpus contains zero correction alternatives and does not train lexical correction or abstention.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Licensed noisy/dialect/transcription/code-switch data with reviewed alternatives, calibrated preserve/correct/hypothesize/abstain targets, and overcorrection attacks.

mechanisms.current_finding: A trainable stage route, separate typed code vocabulary, and exact compact inverse transport now cover the selected canonical corpus without truncation. The compiler target is learned iteratively in bounded eight-node chunks from visible source, the previous compact generated program, and integrity-bound accumulated state; final merged programs are exactly revalidated. The source corpus includes independently replayed MASC frame/decision/event families, complete MPQA attribution graphs, 9,785 human GUM eRST neighborhoods, 5,361 GUM entity/coreference records, 7,180 concept capsules, the 14-operator scoped ABI, and 1,525 source-grounded two-proposition programs. Quota-aware raw-source-disjoint selection retains every frozen objective floor and all 96 grounded question records while hiding answers and model outcomes. This is architecture/data-path readiness, not complete proposition semantics, truth, learned scope compilation, or learned competence; unsupported source fields remain opaque bytes.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Trainable serialization-path mechanics; no semantic compilation, compositionality, paraphrase convergence, or learned Kernel competence claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Human/replayed multi-proposition graphs with scope, modality, coreference, temporal/causal relations, ambiguity, minimal pairs, paraphrase convergence, cycle, and entailment/question-preservation objectives.

mechanisms.current_finding: The canonical corpus exercises 7,180 provenance-bound document-local capsules across 5,361 GUM entity/coreference records. K1j adds a deterministic cross-document registry over the pinned English WordNet-derived ConceptNet 5.7 graph: 218,061 source-declared edges, 174,480 stable URI-derived identities, and 410,638 normalized aliases. A separate parser independently replays every admitted edge, concept, alias, digest, license, and SQLite constraint. Learned compiler output may emit only a bounded surface request with optional non-authoritative POS/sense hints; it cannot mint or select stable identity or provenance. Deterministic resolution attaches identity only when the normalized surface maps to one global registry identity. Hints never collapse ambiguity, all ambiguous/unknown states remain explicit, registry faults fail closed, and the route writes zero model-training rows.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Exact document-local coreference binding plus deterministic cross-document WordNet-derived relation lookup and ambiguity preservation. No assertion-truth, graph-completeness, open-world definition quality, learned linking, migration success, utility, or KERC promotion claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Source-disjoint model-generated resolution requests in natural contexts; ambiguity clarification, unseen definitions, capsule reuse, alias and sense interventions, version migration, collision/stale-definition/wrong-identity attacks, and causal utility compared with registry-withheld and shuffled controls.

mechanisms.current_finding: A compatibility hash exists, but no learned grammar-aware macro inventory is present or exercised by the canonical corpus.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: No macro-fusion, shortening, or compute claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Train-only grammar-valid macro induction with deterministic expansion, heldout undertraining statistics, collision/migration tests, and equal-budget no-macro control.

mechanisms.current_finding: Four typed residual channels, VCM lifecycle, replay, synchronization, and privacy fields exist; current supervision predicts channel presence and the corpus does not populate an interaction-global residual dictionary.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Residual packet/lifecycle/codec mechanics only; no learned hierarchy value or interaction amortization claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Per-unit source-bound residual decisions and real multi-turn shared dictionaries with context-present/withheld/shuffled/wrong-user causal controls.

mechanisms.current_finding: Typed claims and decisions exist. Independently replayed MASC composite, decision-semantic, event-coreference, complete MPQA-relation, GUM eRST, and GUM entity/coreference strata produce 7,061 multi-claim packets and 16,517 multi-node programs. K1l gives 1,525 GUM rows bounded two-proposition scope and typed answer roles across six operators while preserving 90 ambiguous multi-edge neighborhoods as exclusions. The entity/coreference stratum preserves 3,542 complete non-singleton source-declared components plus 1,819 bridge relations with complete endpoint components and 7,180 document-local capsules. These are annotation-preservation and bounded scope targets, not truth or learned reasoning. There are still no derivation proofs, contradictions, general quantities, complete proposition semantics, broad quantification or compositional negation supervision, unresolved ambiguity, or PARTIAL decisions, and unsupported source content remains opaque byte literals.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Answer schema and validation mechanics only; no structured reasoning or exact-answer semantic quality claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Multi-claim derivations, quantities/units/ranges, evidence links, alternatives, contradictions, unresolved ambiguity, PARTIAL, and compositional answer supervision.

mechanisms.current_finding: A trainable renderer route, surface vocabulary, and copy path exist, but no behavior-positive source-disjoint renderer evidence exists.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Trainable route, shape, and checkpoint mechanics only; deterministic/literal rendering receives zero learned credit.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Model-only paraphrase and faithful/lossless rendering with copy interventions, rare identifiers, quotations, style controls, and independent functional/human evaluation.

mechanisms.current_finding: KE-SERIALIZATION-2.0 and the compact learned transport exactly decode and compare roots, typed arguments, confidence, derivation, alignments, claims, and decisions. Verifier negatives corrupt the actual compact learned ABI and receive zero generator loss. The source-independent scoped-semantic verifier reconstructs all 14 ABI operators, while a separate raw-source path reconstructs 1,525 admitted human eRST programs and rejects direction, role, span, authority, and shared-edge mutations. The answer hard projection still ignores opaque byte-literal content and the learned verifier has not been calibrated on broad semantic corruptions.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Listed structured-dimension mutation detection and verifier-head mechanics only; no semantic equivalence, truth, or verification-value claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Reject byte-literal substitution plus independently produced hard negatives for scope, time, causality, attribution, quantity, caveat, ambiguity, and correlated compiler/recompiler error.

mechanisms.current_finding: The adaptive order-1 arithmetic codec has exact encode/decode replay and explicit encoded/uncompressed bit receipts.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Faithful finite-state codec mechanics and measured bit cost only; not a learned entropy model, compression win, or total-system efficiency result.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Retain as the strong exact baseline; any learned challenger must include parameters, latency, memory, energy, synchronization, and recovery cost.

mechanisms.current_finding: Four packet-level fidelity candidates are selected using measured encoded bits, omitted packet-owned residual mass, calibrated source-visible structural importance, and protected minima.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Faithful implementation of this narrow packet-level structural controller only; its distortion is not semantic utility and it is not the paper's learned per-unit allocator.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Keep as a matched baseline for the per-unit learned constrained policy.

mechanisms.current_finding: KPP-1.2 materializes 229,852 stable residual units across 27,941 independently replayed records: 27,941 interaction entries, 49,478 segment/frame units, 115,180 token residues, 7,180 concept realizations, and 30,073 exact objects. Every unit has four real typed payload candidates, exact dictionary-conditioned codec receipts, a compact 13-dimension structural-distortion vector, a per-unit hard minimum and ceiling, a separately typed source residual and render plan, and an independently recomputed selection. Causal conditioning excludes the priced unit while preserving strictly higher residual state. KPP-1.1 migration preserves every legacy payload field and rejects tampering or unknown versions. The cold producer is GREEN in 3,585.081 seconds, exact warm replay is 3.78 seconds, the four-worker independent verifier is GREEN in 1,974.212 seconds, and exact verifier replay is 12.14 seconds.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Faithful K2 unit identity, payload, codec-cost, structural-constraint, selection, migration, cache-invalidation, and replay mechanics only. Structural distortion is not semantic or downstream utility; the selector is not learned or intervention-sensitive; no compression, efficiency, capability, or KERC-thesis win is claimed.
mechanisms.next_evidence: K3 must derive source-disjoint intervention-sensitive targets with independent semantic and downstream evaluators, then train and calibrate the per-unit policy against structural, packet-wide, token-only, global-only, and oracle controls.

mechanisms.current_finding: The current neural head predicts four record-level channel-presence labels. It has no source-bound per-unit q_i decisions, measured per-unit rates/distortions, constraints, or missing-signal masks.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: No learned residual allocation claim. Presence-label overfit is a mechanics diagnostic only.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Typed units, candidate actions, causal importance features, measured rate/distortion, hard constraints, differentiable constrained training, intervention sensitivity, and policy-versus-oracle regret.

mechanisms.current_finding: Promotion economics and VCM state transitions exist, but the corpus uses independent records and has no nonempty coded interaction-global dictionary. The interaction target is currently derived from segment presence.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Promotion transaction and break-even arithmetic mechanics only; no learned reuse, declining per-turn overhead, consistency, or causal utility claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Coherent multi-turn episodes with repeated terminology, learned promote/local decisions, per-turn rate curves, expiry/deletion, wrong-user isolation, and context causal ablations.

mechanisms.current_finding: A shared trunk with stage adapters, typed code-space masks, auxiliary heads, joint-loss plumbing, and a no-fallback causal compiler/core/renderer execution route exists. Compiler chunks consume only visible source plus prior generated compiler state; reasoner chunks are topologically scheduled and consume direct predecessor stubs plus exact prior generated claims; answer assembly restores canonical claim order before the renderer and independent recompile-and-compare route. All 53,414 canonical views are materializable. Two source-bound MLX profiles now pass stage gradients, exact representative-subset overfit, real autoregressive execution, learned protected-span declarations followed by independent byte reconstruction, causal use of generated prior compiler/core state, exact checkpoint reload, and the enclosing bounded mechanics canary. The protected-single profile reaches exact token recovery in 936 updates and the two-chunk hierarchical profile reaches exact recovery in 1,536 updates while executing all nine expected stages without fallback. Fresh-process checkpoint branching passes two calibration and two untouched validation seeds with identical discrete outcomes inside independently derived numerical envelopes. Plain 80-update joint training retains observed ANSWER/CLARIFY/ABSTAIN mechanics at 0.9333 macro balanced accuracy. A matched class-balanced rehearsal candidate reaches 1.0 decision macro accuracy but is not adopted because it regresses token accuracy by 0.1806. No source-disjoint learned competence is claimed.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Shared-trunk route, gradient, shape, and objective compatibility mechanics only.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Representative-subset overfit and interventions for protected spans, compiler, core, per-unit allocator, answer head, renderer, and verifier under one versioned objective ledger.

mechanisms.current_finding: KERC tensors, optimizer state, schema identity, migration, rollback, and bounded Apple-MLX execution replay are integrated. Checkpoint and optimizer reload are exact. A causal branch now publishes one content-addressed step-48 checkpoint, then compares uninterrupted continuation with a fresh process that loads that exact state. Two calibration seeds derive envelopes with a frozen 4x safety factor and absolute hard ceilings; two untouched validation seeds preserve every discrete outcome. Validation maxima are 2.8313e-7 for parameters, 9.8226e-9 for optimizer state, 1.0968e-5 for token logits, and 5.9605e-8 for verifier logits, all inside the derived envelopes and hard ceilings.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Exact checkpoint/optimizer reload plus bounded fresh-process float32 MLX restart mechanics only; no sustained throughput, energy, CUDA parity, source-disjoint competence, or learned utility claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Run multi-seed full-shape resource replay with memory/energy telemetry and cropped/uncropped equivalence before the campaign.

mechanisms.current_finding: The decision head can overfit observed ANSWER/CLARIFY/ABSTAIN mechanics. Under a matched 80-optimizer-update joint objective, the plain route retains 0.9333 macro balanced accuracy and passes the frozen 0.75 floor. A deterministic class-balanced rehearsal schedule reaches 1.0 decision macro accuracy under the same update budget, but is rejected because token accuracy regresses by 0.1806 and therefore fails the preregistered nondecision-preservation rule. PARTIAL remains absent and the result is not source-disjoint calibration or selective-risk evidence.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Source-disjoint PARTIAL, ambiguity, insufficient/conflicting evidence, calibration, selective-risk, class-balance, and decision-intervention evidence.

hypotheses.claim_ceiling: No evidence until the frozen matched campaign measures expanded/compact lengths and all residual/object/macro overhead.
No evidence until matched end-to-end quality and full FLOP/latency/energy/KV/lifecycle cost are measured.
No evidence until matched raw bytes, FLOPs, tuning, seeds, source-disjoint utility, and uncertainty are measured.
Exact-object mechanics are not a learned fidelity win; no evidence until equal-budget rare-name/identifier/number/quotation comparisons run.
No evidence until per-unit learned hierarchy beats token-only, global-only, and no-residual controls on rate and fidelity.
No evidence while the coded global dictionary is empty and no coherent multi-turn rate curve exists.
No evidence until independent semantic verification reduces accepted errors under matched retry and total cost.
No evidence until spelling/domain/OOD transfer is source-disjoint and compared against strong byte/dynamic-chunking controls without aggressive-correction hiding.

integration.rule: Any KERC roadmap, registry, promotion, freeze, or negative-verdict claim must remain at or below this independently audited claim ceiling.
